creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
Hey, guys. Can somebody look at this PR?

2012/10/23 Sayetsky Anton <vsjcfm@gmail.com>:
>
>>Number:         172975
>>Category:       ports
>>Synopsis:       [patch] misc/zoneinfo: correct description
>>Confidential:   no
>>Severity:       non-critical
>>Priority:       low
>>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>>State:          open
>>Quarter:
>>Keywords:
>>Date-Required:
>>Class:          change-request
>>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>>Arrival-Date:   Tue Oct 23 07:50:00 UTC 2012
>>Closed-Date:
>>Last-Modified:
>>Originator:     Sayetsky Anton
>>Release:        FreeBSD 8.3-RELEASE-p3 amd64
>>Organization:
>>Environment:
> System: FreeBSD jw.local 8.3-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 8.3-RELEASE-p3 #0 r238787: Thu Jul 26 12:47:26 EEST 2012 root@jw.local:/tmp/obj/media/dvlfiles/build/src/sys/JASONW amd64
>>Description:
> As I know, correct way to not build zoneinfo files is adding option to src.conf, not to make.conf.
>>How-To-Repeat:
>>Fix:
> Patch attached with sumbission follows:
>
> --- patch-pkg-descr begins here ---
> --- pkg-descr.orig      2012-10-23 10:33:35.000000000 +0300
> +++ pkg-descr   2012-10-23 10:34:01.000000000 +0300
> @@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
>
>  Note that this port overwrites system files in /usr/share/zoneinfo.
>
> -If you build your systems from source, please add MK_ZONEINFO="no"
> -to your /etc/make.conf.
> +If you build your systems from source, please add WITHOUT_ZONEINFO=
> +to your /etc/src.conf.
> --- patch-pkg-descr ends here ---
>
>
>>Release-Note:
>>Audit-Trail:
>>Unformatted:
> _______________________________________________
> freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org mailing list
> http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-bugs
